issues.description: Missing second effect: [When Attacking] If you have 6 or less DON!! cards on your field, look at 2 cards from the top of your deck and place them at the top or bottom of your deck in any order.
Condition should be 'HasAttachedDon' (cost requirement) not 'HasRestingDon'. The card costs 1 DON!! to activate, meaning attached/available DON!! must be spent.

actions.description: Look at 2 cards from top of deck and place them at top or bottom in any order
